success.description: You cast the spell, and the nimbus hardens, increasing your soak value by 1 while this spell is recharging

boon.description: When you suffer a critical wound with a severity no greater than the recharge tokens on this spell, you may completely recharge this spell to convert the critical wound to a normal wound

bane.description: Weapon attacks that target you have their critical value reduced by 1 while this spell is recharging

challenge.description: Effect: A nimbus of black smoke surrounds you. While this spell recharges, Melee Attack, Ranged Attack, Spell, and Blessing actions that target you add to their dice pools

success.description: You cast the spell and the malevolent energies cause all enemies within medium range to suffer 1 fatigue

boon.description: When you suffer a critical wound with a severity no greater than the recharge tokens on this spell, you may completely recharge this spell to convert the critical wound to a normal wound
All actions modified by this spell gain " Suffer 1 wound" as a potential result

challenge.description: Effect: A nimbus of black smoke surrounds you. While this spell recharges, Melee Attack, Ranged Attack, Spell, and Blessing actions that target you add to their dice pools
